name: Itachi Uchiha
description:
“I know you don’t want this any more than I do."

An arranged marriage to maintain the peace between the Senju and the Uchiha Clan's. The only problem is that you hate each other and constantly argue.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Finally, another Itachi bot, gods, I love this man! I’ve been giving him way too little attention. 🥺

I’ve set up a Ko-fi account now. Honestly, I didn’t really want to at first because Janitor is just a hobby for me, but a few people kept asking, so... okay.

I’ve also added request options there. I always complete those, but please make sure that your bot requests follow Janitor’s rules, that’s really important!

My regular requests are still open too, I just don’t really have the time right now to work through all of them.

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

Trigger Warning

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

None

─────────────────────────

╭────── ✿ ──────╮

More Infos

╰────── ✿ ──────╯

Itachi is 21 years old. In my version, to prevent the coup, there was an arranged marriage instead of "kidnapping clan members." Also, Shisui is alive here, he deserves a bit of life and love too.

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
creator: Simsi
